description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a sunburst finish on the top that transitions from a deep reddish-brown at the edges to a warm amber center. The soundhole is round and bordered by a simple rosette, and the bridge is a standard pin-style wooden bridge. The neck is made of a darker wood, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged three on each side. The back and sides of the guitar are a solid, darker brown, with a white binding running along the edges for contrast. The strings run from the bridge, over the soundhole, up the neck, and are anchored at the headstock. This guitar is typical of those used by street musicians, performers in parks, or in urban music venues.
description: A sunburst-finished acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body, wooden neck, and six tuning pegs. It features a round soundhole, white edge binding, and a dark brown back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, round soundhole, bridge, and full fretboard.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the guitar's body thickness, white binding, and partial view of the headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid dark brown back and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view showing the neck, back, and a glimpse of the guitar's top and side contours.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a simple rectangular shape.
